title: Question Tags and Short Answers
description: Form and use question tags (isn't it? didn't you? can't they?) to check or confirm information, and give short answers (Yes, I do. / No, she didn't.) — two everyday tools for natural conversation.
sources: CEFR A2 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Raymond Murphy, Essential Grammar in Use (question tags; short answers)
